question: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest total air passengers from port authority of New York and New Jersey airports? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: An aviation analyst wants to identify the lowest-traffic year at the Port Authority airports in the early 2010s.

1.fact: Summing Total Passengers across all airports and months for 2011-2015, the lowest total occurs in 2011 at 105878221.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest total air passengers from port authority of New York and New Jersey airports? (Sum Total Passengers by Year across all airports and months; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest total passenger count? (Sum Total Passengers by Year across all airports and months; select the minimum.) The answer is 2011.
